responsibility: Provides unit and integration tests to validate the correctness of aggregator, context engine, dependency graph builder, fix prompt generator, graph diagnostics, graph query, and rule engine modules, using mock data and isolated temporary directories.

children.role: Vitest test suite for the Aggregator engine that validates AI summary aggregation over source file directories.
Vitest unit test suite for the ContextEngine class.
Vitest test suite for the dependency-graph engine, verifying graph construction from mock Spine units.
Unit test suite for the fix-prompt engine module.
TypeScript test suite for the graph diagnostics engine (graph-diagnostics.ts).
Test suite providing unit coverage for graph-query dependency graph traversal and analysis functions.
Unit test suite for the RuleEngine class, verifying rule matching from YAML front-matter files via temporary filesystem setup.
